title: ADK-102: Advanced Configs & Multi-model Setup
author: Google Cloud
description: Dive deep into agent.yaml properties. Configure model backends, safety filters, context parameters, temperature, and tokens.

features.title: YAML Schema
features.description: Examine the nested schema fields of agent.yaml, including settings, safety filters, and execution properties.

features.title: Safety Thresholds
features.description: Set block limits for hate speech, harassment, sexually explicit content, and dangerous scenarios.

features.title: Backend Selection
features.description: Learn to alternate between models like Gemini Flash, Gemini Pro, and configure secondary fallbacks.
